title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
